sql_array: CREATE TABLE business_service (service_id INT PRIMARY KEY, service_name VARCHAR(255), service_description TEXT);
INSERT INTO business_service (service_id, service_name, service_description) VALUES (1, 'Test Service', 'This is a test service description.');
UPDATE business_service SET service_description = 'Updated service description.' WHERE service_id = 1;
SELECT * FROM business_service WHERE service_name LIKE '%Service%';
CALL uddi_save_service(1, 'Test Service', 'This is a test service description.');
